title: Inventory UI Modules
summary: Current-state inventory of source-only metadata for the nine committed src/ui/ TypeScript modules that model the vanilla DOOM 1.9 user-interface surface: UI lump-name catalog, automap pan/zoom/draw, ENDOOM 80x25 cell screen parser, finale text/cast/bunny screens, title-page and demo-loop front-end sequencer, HUD message queue and DOOM 1 map titles, single-player intermission state machine, menu navigation and skull cursor, and status-bar widgets/face/keyboxes, without embedding proprietary WAD bytes.
evidence_method: inventory lane local repository audit using git ls-files-compatible Bun.Glob scans, sha256sum-equivalent SHA-256 fingerprints, src/ui/, test/ui/, reference/manifests/vanilla-limit-summary.json, reference/manifests/source-catalog.json Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 anchors, and package.json Bun script context.

modules.role: Defines the canonical UI lump-name catalog (HU_FONT_LUMP_PREFIX with start/end characters, status-bar face stride and pain/turn/ouch/evilgrin/rampage offsets, status-bar background/keys/numbers/percent lumps, intermission backgrounds/labels/animations/numbers/players/you-are-here/splat lumps, menu skull/title/box lumps, finale credit/help/title lumps) and the resolveUiAssetLumps directory walker that turns a parsed WAD directory into a UiAssetCatalog of lump indices for each named asset category.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 hu_stuff.c HU_FONTSTART/HU_FONTEND prefix font, st_lib.c/st_stuff.c status-bar lump names, wi_stuff.c intermission lump names, m_menu.c menu lump names, and f_finale.c finale lump names that the UI surface fetches from the WAD directory.

modules.role: Implements the AutomapState fixed-point pan/zoom/follow record, the AM_LevelInit/AM_Start/AM_Stop lifecycle, AM_Ticker per-frame zoom and follow update, AM_ftom/AM_mtof/AM_CXMTOF/AM_CYMTOF coordinate conversions, AM_clipMline Cohen-Sutherland line clipper, AM_drawFline Bresenham line walker, AM_rotate angle rotation, AM_addMark/AM_clearMarks scratch mark store, and the WALL/CDWALL/FDWALL/TS/SECRET/THING/GRID palette-index color tables that the automap renderer uses.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 am_map.c AM_Start, AM_Stop, AM_Ticker, AM_clipMline, AM_drawFline, AM_rotate, AM_addMark, AM_clearMarks, AM_LevelInit, AM_initVariables and the WALLCOLORS/CDWALLCOLORS/FDWALLCOLORS/TSWALLCOLORS/SECRETWALLCOLORS/THINGCOLORS/GRIDCOLORS palette-index automap color constants.

modules.role: Parses the 4000-byte ENDOOM lump into an 80-column, 25-row EndoomScreen of EndoomCell{character, attribute} pairs that I_Endoom paints to the host text console at quit time, with ENDOOM_BYTES_PER_CELL=2, ENDOOM_COLUMNS=80, ENDOOM_ROWS=25, ENDOOM_CELL_COUNT=2000, and ENDOOM_SIZE=4000 vanilla layout constants.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 i_endoom.c I_Endoom 80x25 PC text-mode ENDOOM lump rendering and d_main.c quit-flow ENDOOM display behavior.

modules.role: Implements the F_StartFinale/F_Ticker/F_TextWrite text-reveal and cast/bunny-scroll state machine, per-episode FLAT lump anchors (FLOOR4_8 for E1, SFLR6_1 for E2, MFLR8_4 for E3, MFLR8_3 for E4), per-episode E1_TEXT/E2_TEXT/E3_TEXT/E4_TEXT post-episode strings, the FINALE_CAST_MAP cast-call mobj sequence, and the TEXTSPEED=3 reveal speed and TEXTWAIT=250 post-text wait timing constants.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 f_finale.c F_StartFinale, F_Ticker, F_TextWrite, F_CastTicker, F_BunnyScroll text-reveal and cast/bunny scroll behavior with the per-episode flat and text constants.

modules.role: Implements the FrontEndSequenceState title-loop/page-ticker/advance-demo state machine that mirrors D_PageTicker/D_AdvanceDemo: alternates TITLE-CREDIT-TITLE-DEMO pages, picks the initial HelpLump (HELP for shareware, HELP1/HELP2 for registered/retail), tracks menu-active suspension, and decodes input keys into AdvanceDemoKeyAction/OpenMenuKeyAction/OpenHelpKeyAction/NoneKeyAction events plus IdleTickAction/PlayDemoTickAction/ShowPageTickAction tick events.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 d_main.c D_StartTitle, D_PageTicker, D_PageDrawer, D_AdvanceDemo, D_DoomLoop title-loop and demo-cycle behavior with the per-game-mode HELP/HELP1/HELP2 first-page selection.

modules.role: Implements the HudMessageState pickup/death/secret-found message queue with HU_MSGTIMEOUT=4*TICRATE=140-tic timeout, the per-map HUSTR_E1M1 through HUSTR_E4M9 DOOM 1 map-name table (DOOM1_MAP_NAMES, 36 entries: 4 episodes x 9 maps), the HU_MSGX/HU_MSGY/HU_MSGWIDTH/HU_MSGHEIGHT/HU_TITLEX/HU_TITLEY/HU_TITLEHEIGHT message and title position constants, and the HU_MAXLINELENGTH=64 line-wrap limit.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 hu_stuff.c HU_Start, HU_Ticker, HU_Erase HUD message queue and the HUSTR_E1M1..HUSTR_E4M9 vanilla map-name string table.

modules.role: Implements the IntermissionState single-player kills/items/secrets/time/par stats animator with the SP_STATE_INITIAL_PAUSE/KILLS/PAUSE_AFTER_KILLS/ITEMS/PAUSE_AFTER_ITEMS/SECRETS/PAUSE_AFTER_SECRETS/TIME_AND_PAR/PAUSE_AFTER_TIME/FINAL state machine, the SP_KILLS_DELTA/SP_ITEMS_DELTA/SP_SECRETS_DELTA/SP_TIME_DELTA per-tic counter step, the WI_PISTOL_BCNT_MASK pistol-tick blink mask, and the WI_SHOW_NEXT_LOC_TICS=4*TICRATE next-location pointer-blink window.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 wi_stuff.c WI_Ticker, WI_initStats, WI_updateStats single-player intermission state machine and the SP_KILLS/SP_ITEMS/SP_SECRETS/SP_TIME counter-step behavior.

modules.role: Implements the MenuState navigation record, the MENU_TREE main/episode/skill/options/sound/screen/save/load/help/quit/end-game tree definition, the M_StartMenu/M_OpenMessage prompt machinery, M_StartControlPanel/handleMenuKey skull-cursor navigation, the SAVESTRINGSIZE=24 vanilla save-string limit, the LINEHEIGHT=16 menu line height, MAX_LOAD_SAVE_SLOTS=8 vanilla save-slot cap, the SKILL_NIGHTMARE_INDEX=4 nightmare confirmation gate, the SKULL_ANIM_TIME=8-tic skull blink, and the MOUSE_JOY_REPEAT_DELAY repeat-input throttle.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 m_menu.c M_StartControlPanel, M_Drawer, M_Responder, M_StartMessage menu navigation, save-string limit (SAVESTRINGSIZE=24), and the eight-slot vanilla save/load menu plus skull-cursor blink behavior.

modules.role: Implements the ST_StatusBarState face-widget priority animator (ST_FACE_PRIORITY_LOOK=0 through ST_FACE_PRIORITY_DEAD=9), the calcPainOffset pain-row pick, the ST_TURNCOUNT=35-tic turn timer, ST_RAMPAGEDELAY=70-tic rampage timer, ST_OUCHCOUNT=35-tic ouch face, ST_EVILGRINCOUNT=70-tic evil grin, ST_STRAIGHTFACECOUNT=17-tic straight idle, ST_MUCHPAIN=20 damage threshold, the updateKeyBoxes/tickFaceWidget/tickStatusBar per-tick run, and the computeStatusBarValues key/ammo/armor widget projection.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 st_stuff.c ST_Ticker, ST_updateFaceWidget face-priority and ST_calcPainOffset/ST_NUMPAINFACES face animation timing, plus st_lib.c key-box and number widgets.

test_coverage.notes: test/ui/ covers the AutomapState pan/zoom/follow lifecycle and clip/draw line walker, F_StartFinale text-reveal and bunny scroll/cast call sequencing, FrontEndSequenceState title/credit/demo page rotation and HelpLump first-page pick, HudMessageState pickup/death/secret message queue and HUSTR_E1M1..HUSTR_E4M9 map-name table, IntermissionState single-player SP_STATE_* counter animator, MenuState skull-cursor blink and SAVESTRINGSIZE=24 save-name editing, ST_StatusBarState face-priority animator and ST_calcPainOffset, and resolveUiAssetLumps WAD-directory walker that turns the parsed directory into a UiAssetCatalog of lump indices. ENDOOM parsing is exercised by test/wad/misc-assets.test.ts at the WAD asset boundary rather than by a dedicated test/ui/endoom.test.ts.

reference_manifest_status.notes: Manifest alignment records the vanilla SAVESTRINGSIZE=24 menu save-string limit, the SCREENWIDTH=320 and SCREENHEIGHT=200 framebuffer dimensions that bound the status-bar/automap/intermission/finale draw windows, the MAXPLAYERS=4 player-cap referenced by intermission and finale results, the TICRATE=35 timing baseline used by every UI tick counter, and the canonical Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 am_map.c/d_main.c/f_finale.c/hu_stuff.c/m_menu.c/st_stuff.c/wi_stuff.c UI source files that the src/ui/ modules model; this inventory does not embed WAD bytes or proprietary game data.

ui_boundary_status.notes: src/ui/ owns the user-interface surface partitioned into ui_assets (assets.ts) for the cross-cutting WAD lump-name catalog, ui_front_end (endoom.ts, frontEndSequence.ts, menus.ts) for the launcher/title/menu/quit flow, ui_in_game (automap.ts, hudMessages.ts, statusBar.ts) for the in-game overlays the player sees while in a level, and ui_session (finale.ts, intermission.ts) for the between-level intermission stats and the post-episode finale/cast/bunny screens. UI modules accept Player/AutomapState/MenuState/HudMessageState/StatusBarState/IntermissionState/FinaleState records and tick contexts through injected parameters so each module is unit-tested without a live WAD or framebuffer.

implications: src/ui/menus.ts and src/ui/frontEndSequence.ts are the broadest export surfaces in the UI lane (each with 20 src/ importers and 20-21 test importers). Reshaping MenuState, MenuAction, the MENU_TREE definition, the FrontEndSequenceState record, the FrontEndKeyAction discriminated union, or the HelpLump variant set is a cross-lane breaking change that the launch, bootstrap, input, player, save, and audio lanes must absorb together; downstream Phase 10 follow-ups 10-001 through 10-019 depend on these exports staying stable across the inventory baseline.

src/ui/assets.ts is the canonical bridge from the parsed WAD directory to every UI module: STATUS_BAR_BACKGROUND_LUMP/STATUS_BAR_KEY_LUMPS for src/ui/statusBar.ts, INTERMISSION_BACKGROUND_LUMPS/INTERMISSION_NUMBER_LUMPS/INTERMISSION_PLAYER_LUMPS for src/ui/intermission.ts, FRONT_END_TITLE_LUMP/FRONT_END_HELP_LUMPS/MENU_ASSET_LUMPS for src/ui/frontEndSequence.ts and src/ui/menus.ts, and HU_FONT_LUMP_PREFIX for src/ui/hudMessages.ts. resolveUiAssetLumps takes the WAD directory record and returns a UiAssetCatalog of lump indices; downstream UI rendering must call it once at startup before any UI module references a lump.

UI modules accept Player, AutomapState, MenuState, HudMessageState, StatusBarState, IntermissionState, FinaleState records and tick contexts through injected parameters, so the launch and gameplay lanes must wire those state records, the per-frame tickFaceWidget/tickStatusBar/tickHudMessages/tickIntermission/tickFinale/tickMenu/tickFrontEnd calls, and the input-key dispatcher (handleMenuKey/handleFrontEndKey) at startup before any UI element draws. The face-widget animator (tickFaceWidget) is the only persistent UI state with a hidden RNG dependency: it routes ST_FACE_PRIORITY_PAIN/EVIL_GRIN/RAMPAGE through the DOOM LCG via injected callbacks, so per-frame ordering must match vanilla.

src/ui/menus.ts SAVESTRINGSIZE=24 vanilla save-string cap, MAX_LOAD_SAVE_SLOTS=8 vanilla save-slot cap, src/ui/intermission.ts MAXPLAYERS=4 player-cap, src/ui/finale.ts MAXPLAYERS=4, and src/ui/hudMessages.ts HU_MSGTIMEOUT=4*TICRATE=140-tic message timeout are bit-exact mirrors of vanilla doomdef.h, hu_stuff.h, hu_lib.h, and m_menu.c constants; downstream UI parity gates 10-027/10-028 must keep these pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 defaults until a Dehacked or non-vanilla mode permits override.

src/ui/statusBar.ts ST_TURNCOUNT=35, ST_RAMPAGEDELAY=70, ST_OUCHCOUNT=35, ST_EVILGRINCOUNT=70, ST_STRAIGHTFACECOUNT=17, ST_MUCHPAIN=20 face-animator tick counters and src/ui/automap.ts WALLCOLORS/CDWALLCOLORS/FDWALLCOLORS/TSWALLCOLORS/SECRETWALLCOLORS/THINGCOLORS/GRIDCOLORS palette-index tables are the canonical st_stuff.c and am_map.c constants that downstream Phase 09 follow-ups 09-026 through 09-033 and the Phase 09 gate 09-038 must lock to vanilla defaults.

src/ui/endoom.ts ENDOOM_COLUMNS=80, ENDOOM_ROWS=25, ENDOOM_BYTES_PER_CELL=2, ENDOOM_CELL_COUNT=2000, ENDOOM_SIZE=4000 PC text-mode lump layout constants are the canonical i_endoom.c values that Phase 03 follow-up 03-010 (clean quit and ENDOOM policy) must keep pinned. ENDOOM is the only UI module not exercised by a dedicated test/ui/endoom.test.ts; its parser is covered indirectly by test/wad/misc-assets.test.ts at the WAD asset boundary.
